title: Achter de Schermen: A Static Digital Scholarly Edition of Willem Elsschot's Achter de Schermen and Opdracht
description:
Static HTML edition of Willem Elsschot's Achter de Schermen and the dedication ("Opdracht") to Tsjip, presenting all witnesses with full critical apparatus, facsimile images, and genetic (writing-process) views. Originally published in 2007 as an Apache Cocoon application on CD-ROM; rebuilt as a fully static, self-contained, redistributable HTML edition as part of the postdoctoral project 'Lots of Copies Keep Stuff Safe: Future-Proofing Digital Scholarly Editions' (2025–2028). Source files, XSLT, and build tooling are maintained separately at centre-for-manuscript-genetics/ads.

The texts of Achter de Schermen and Opdracht are © Erven A. De Ridder (Willem Elsschot)/Athenaeum – Polak & Van Gennep, Amsterdam. All rights reserved. The electronic edition is made available under CC BY 4.0.
